description_long: This is a large, cubic wooden storage box constructed from light brown planks arranged vertically and diagonally, reinforced with visible metal fasteners at the corners. The box features a classic crate design, with diagonal cross-bracing on each face for added structural integrity and a rustic appearance. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving it a natural, unfinished look suitable for industrial or outdoor urban environments. The top of the box is flat and solid, matching the sides in material and construction style, making it suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. There are no visible handles, locks, or openings, suggesting it is a sealed container. The overall build and finish imply durability and functionality for storage or transport in garages, warehouses, or street-side settings.
description: A large, light brown wooden crate with diagonal cross-bracing and visible metal fasteners, featuring a rustic, sturdy design. The box is fully enclosed with a flat top and no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: The front view shows a wooden panel with a prominent diagonal brace and metal fasteners at the corners.
description_view_1: This side view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same diagonal bracing and wood paneling.
description_view_2: Another side view, matching the previous faces with consistent diagonal bracing and wood texture.
description_view_3: The final view continues the pattern, showing the same wooden construction and diagonal support.
